//_Documentation.rng_seed: Seed for reproducibility of preference shocks.
//_Documentation.neumann_k: Number of Neumann iterations for Leontief inverse approximations.
//_Documentation.primal_tol: Precision for primal gap and step size in the IPM solver.
//_Documentation.dual_tol: Precision for dual gradient and CG convergence in the IPM solver.
//_Documentation.kappa_factor: Global multiplier for sectoral capital intensity (B matrix).
//_Documentation.wage_rate: Homogeneous wage rate used to derive labor coefficients.
//_Documentation.drift: Volatility (sigma) of consumer preference shocks in the OU process.
//_Documentation.kappa_ou: Mean-reversion speed (theta) of consumer preferences towards the moving habit target.
//_Documentation.habit_persistence: EMA decay parameter (gamma) controlling how slowly the habit target tracks actual consumption.
//_Documentation.g_step: Per-quarter growth rate of government expenditure (e.g. 0.005 = 0.5%/qtr = 2%/yr). Set to 0 to hold G constant.
